title: Chatiyta' #2410
definition:
Hatita = "exploring"

 1) head of a family of Levitical porters or gate-keepers who returned
    from exile with Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:

 1) head of a family of Levitical porters or gate-keepers who returned
    from exile with Zerubbabel
